Hero.description: I analyze, design, and develop systems according to your needs using modern technologies and tools

About.title: About me
About.paragraph1: Victor Martinez, systems engineer and full-stack developer. Specialized in planning, designing, and building systems. Currently focused on web and mobile applications.
About.title2: What do you know about web development?
About.paragraph2: Through the JavaScript environment: Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, React, Material Design, Bootstrap
About.title3: What do you know about mobile development?
About.paragraph3: I have skills in developing mobile applications for Android and iOS using React Native + Expo and EAS for deployment.
About.title4: What do you know about UI/UX?
About.paragraph4: Through the Figma tool, I design and prototype user interfaces
About.title5: What do you specifically do as a systems engineer?
About.paragraph5: Generally, I analyze, design, and develop computer systems, but I also manage projects, offer methodological solutions to soft and hard problems, and I am committed to systemic order
About.title6: What planning strategies do you use?
About.paragraph6: I use diagramming tools like Draw.io, Kanban philosophy, Trello, Microsoft Tasks, brainstorming, whiteboard use, recording and transcribing conversations, and AI analysis and retrospectives with NotebookLM
About.title7: Are you up to date with AI?
About.paragraph7: I built sales agents and task managers with AI through the MCP protocol, using code editors like Cursor and Antigravity. Knowledge of Rules, Skills, Actions, and project deployment with local models using LM Studio and Ollama
About.paragraph8: Use of Git and GitHub commands
About.title9: What do others think about you?
About.paragraph9: Very methodical, humble, focused, proactive, analytical, with leadership potential

Certificates.title: Certificates
Certificates.subtitle: Verifiable moments of my career as a developer

AboutPage.text: Hi! I'm Victor, a web developer passionate about creating engaging and functional digital experiences. I specialize in modern technologies like React, Next.js, and TypeScript. I enjoy continuous learning, collaborating in teams, and taking on new challenges. My goal is to provide creative and efficient solutions in every project, always maintaining quality and attention to detail. In addition to programming, I am interested in interface design and web performance optimization. I am ready to contribute and keep growing in the development world!
